name: vector-memory-mcp
description: Semantic vector search MCP server for GitHub Copilot CLI session history

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=module -e "import('@huggingface/transformers').then(m=>m.pipeline('feature-extraction','Xenova/gte-small',{dtype:'q8'})).then(()=>console.log('✓ Embedding model ready')).catch(e=>console.error('⚠ Model download failed (will retry on first run):',e.message))"
